body: import java.util.Collection;

import static org.evosuite.runtime.EvoAssertions.*;

option1 = Option(2147483645, ",#mo|9z3u<6T*", "--", "The addValue method is not intended for client use. Subclasses should use the addValueForProcessing method instead. ", True, option_Builder1)
assert isinstance(e, AlreadySelectedException), "Expected AlreadySelectedException, but got {}".format(type(e))
assert str(e) == "The option 'null' was specified but an option from this group has already been selected: '--'"
option1 = Option(2147483645, ",#mo|9z3u<6T*", "--", "The addValue method is not intended for client use. Subclasses should use the addValueForProcessing method instead. ", True, option_Builder1)
